Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
13

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
Q = 19 yrs r =4 yrs u =15 yrs s = 10 yrs V= 12 yrs T=8 yrs
W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
Venus in the Paribhraman Padathi
If natal Venus is strong and well-aspected and is strong in the Paribhraman chart and is in
the Ascendant, the 10th, 11th, 2nd, 9th, 7th or 4th bhavas, then there is plenty of food and
wealth, all the pleasures and enjoyments of life, acquirement of vehicles and is very lucky.
If Venus is exalted or swagrahi, in the 10th, 11th and 2nd, then Venus gives wealth. In the
Ascendant, 7th or 5th, then he gives plenty of women and increases luck in the 9th. If in the
